reference: ONCE UPON A TIME A BRAHMAN WHO WAS WALKING ALONG THE ROAD CAME UPON AN IRON CAGE IN WHICH A GREAT TIGER HAD BEEN SHUT UP BY THE VILLAGERS WHO CAUGHT HIM
text: Once upon a time, a Brahmin, who was walking along the road, came upon an iron cage, in which a great tiger had been shut up by the villagers who caught him.
